Marketing.title: The B2B SaaS Foundation You Can Build On.
Marketing.subtitle: Secure, tenant-isolated data architecture with flexible organization management that accelerates the launch of enterprise-ready applications.

schema.title: Schema-per-tenant Architecture
schema.description: Complete data isolation out of the box using PostgreSQL schemas. Unmatched security for enterprise clients.

rbac.title: Role Based Access
rbac.description: Granular permissions and role management dynamically assigned via generic middleware.

auth.title: Modern Auth
auth.description: Integrated with Better-Auth for robust identity management across organizations.

ui.description: Powered by Tailwind v4 and Shadcn/ui. Beautiful, accessible, and customizable components ready for your brand.

cta.title: Ready to build your SaaS?
cta.subtitle: Stop rebuilding auth, billing, and organizations. Start building your product.

FAQ.title: Common Questions
FAQ.subtitle: Everything you need to know about our enterprise platform.

schema.question: How does the schema-per-tenant isolation work?
schema.answer: Every organization created in our platform is assigned a unique PostgreSQL schema. This ensures that data is physically isolated at the database level, preventing any possibility of cross-tenant data leakage while maintaining the performance of a single database instance.

rbac.question: Can I customize the roles and permissions?
rbac.answer: Yes, our Professional and Enterprise plans allow you to define custom roles with granular permissions (RBAC). You can control access down to specific resources and actions within each organization.

integration.question: How do I integrate my existing tools?
integration.answer: We provide native support for API Keys and Webhooks. You can generate keys for your developers to access our API programmatically, or register webhook URLs to receive real-time notifications about events in your organization.

limits.question: Is there a limit on the number of projects?
limits.answer: The Starter plan includes 2 projects, while Professional and Enterprise plans offer unlimited project creation to support your business growth.
